svg.text: Managed File Transfer on Boomi (powered by Thru) — Solution Architecture
ZONE 1 — TRADING PARTNERS & EXTERNAL PARTIES (untrusted / internet)
ZONE 2 — EDGE / DMZ (protocol termination · no persistent payload storage)
ZONE 3 — BOOMI ENTERPRISE PLATFORM (control plane / SaaS — confirm UK region for OFFICIAL)
ZONE 4 — RUNTIME (trusted zone · customer-managed · HA) — “config over construction”
ZONE 5 — DATA ZONE / SYSTEMS OF RECORD
never a new build per interface
Applied by config: PGP decrypt/encrypt (incl. ASCII-armor) · TAR (de)archive · validate · rename · route · transform · post-action
e.g. CyberArk PAM / Azure Key Vault —
no documented native path to source
